spans.content: For the XsTD-DFT calculation:
std2 -f wb97xD3.molden.inp -wB97XD3 -e 10 -rpa > output
4 The Spectrum Plotting Tool

source_text: Spectra may be plotted and visualized with the SpecDis program. Alternatively, we provide a processing tool called g spec. It uses the file tda.dat (written by the std2 program) as input. Run the tool as:

spans.content: Spectra may be plotted and visualized with the SpecDis program. Alternatively, we
provide a processing tool called g spec. It uses the file tda.dat (written by the std2
program) as input. Run the tool as:

protected_source_text: Spectra may be plotted and visualized with the SpecDis program. Alternatively, we provide a processing tool called g spec. It uses the file tda.dat (written by the std2 program) as input. Run the tool as:
protected_translated_text: 光谱可通过SpecDis程序进行绘制和可视化。此外，我们还提供了一个名为g spec的处理工具。该工具以tda.dat文件（由std2程序生成）作为输入。运行该工具的命令为：
translated_text: 光谱可通过SpecDis程序进行绘制和可视化。此外，我们还提供了一个名为g spec的处理工具。该工具以tda.dat文件（由std2程序生成）作为输入。运行该工具的命令为：

spans.content: g spec < tda.dat

source_text: It will generate two files, spec.dat and rots.dat. The first file contains the spec- trum broadened by Gaussian curves, the latter one contains the pure oscillator/rotatory strengths that can be used to plot a stick spectrum.

spans.content: It will generate two files, spec.dat and rots.dat. The first file contains the spec-
trum broadened by Gaussian curves, the latter one contains the pure oscillator/rotatory
strengths that can be used to plot a stick spectrum.

protected_source_text: It will generate two files, spec.dat and rots.dat. The first file contains the spec- trum broadened by Gaussian curves, the latter one contains the pure oscillator/rotatory strengths that can be used to plot a stick spectrum.
protected_translated_text: 它将生成两个文件：spec.dat 和 rots.dat。第一个文件包含通过高斯曲线展宽的谱图，后一个文件包含可用于绘制棒状谱的纯振子/旋光强度。
translated_text: 它将生成两个文件：spec.dat 和 rots.dat。第一个文件包含通过高斯曲线展宽的谱图，后一个文件包含可用于绘制棒状谱的纯振子/旋光强度。

source_text: The header of the tda.dat defines the options for g spec. Important features are:

spans.content: The header of the tda.dat defines the options for g spec. Important features are:

protected_source_text: The header of the tda.dat defines the options for g spec. Important features are:
protected_translated_text: tda.dat 文件的头部定义了 g spec 的选项。重要特性包括：
translated_text: tda.dat 文件的头部定义了 g spec 的选项。重要特性包括：

source_text: UV Calculate absorption spectra (if not specified, CD is calculated)

spans.content: UV Calculate absorption spectra (if not specified, CD is calculated)

protected_source_text: UV Calculate absorption spectra (if not specified, CD is calculated)
protected_translated_text: UV 计算吸收光谱（如未指定，则计算 CD）
translated_text: UV 计算吸收光谱（如未指定，则计算 CD）

source_text: VELO Use the velocity representations of R and f (the latter if UV is also specified).

spans.content: VELO Use the velocity representations of R and f (the latter if UV is also specified).

protected_source_text: VELO Use the velocity representations of R and f (the latter if UV is also specified).
protected_translated_text: VELO 使用R和f的速度表示（如果同时指定了UV，则包括f）。
translated_text: VELO 使用R和f的速度表示（如果同时指定了UV，则包括f）。

source_text: NM Plot spectrum in nanometer scale instead of eV.

spans.content: NM Plot spectrum in nanometer scale instead of eV.

protected_source_text: NM Plot spectrum in nanometer scale instead of eV.
protected_translated_text: NM 以纳米尺度而非电子伏特绘制光谱。
translated_text: NM 以纳米尺度而非电子伏特绘制光谱。

source_text: WIDTH Half width at 1/e maximum of Gaussian curve (in eV).

spans.content: WIDTH Half width at 1/e maximum of Gaussian curve (in eV).

protected_source_text: WIDTH Half width at 1/e maximum of Gaussian curve (in eV).
protected_translated_text: WIDTH 高斯曲线在1/e最大值处的半宽度（以eV为单位）。
translated_text: WIDTH 高斯曲线在1/e最大值处的半宽度（以eV为单位）。

source_text: SHIFT Energy shift applied to whole spectrum (in eV).

spans.content: SHIFT Energy shift applied to whole spectrum (in eV).

protected_source_text: SHIFT Energy shift applied to whole spectrum (in eV).
protected_translated_text: SHIFT 应用于整个光谱的能量偏移（以eV为单位）。
translated_text: SHIFT 应用于整个光谱的能量偏移（以eV为单位）。

source_text: LFAKTOR Scaling factor for the stick spectrum printed to rots.dat.

spans.content: LFAKTOR Scaling factor for the stick spectrum printed to rots.dat.

protected_source_text: LFAKTOR Scaling factor for the stick spectrum printed to rots.dat.
protected_translated_text: LFAKTOR 打印到rots.dat文件的棒状谱缩放因子。
translated_text: LFAKTOR 打印到rots.dat文件的棒状谱缩放因子。

source_text: RFAKTOR Scaling factor for the broadended spectrum printed to spec.dat.

spans.content: RFAKTOR Scaling factor for the broadended spectrum printed to spec.dat.

protected_source_text: RFAKTOR Scaling factor for the broadended spectrum printed to spec.dat.
protected_translated_text: RFAKTOR 打印到spec.dat文件的展宽谱缩放因子。
translated_text: RFAKTOR 打印到spec.dat文件的展宽谱缩放因子。

source_text: The Gaussian broadened spectrum (spec.dat) contains the molar extinction coefficient (for absorption) or molar circular dichroism (for CD) spectra, both given in units of \mathrm { L \cdot m o l ^ { - 1 } \cdot c m ^ { - 1 } } . The individual transition strengths are given in the same units in rots.dat. Note that by default LFAKTOR is set to 0.5, i.e., these are scaled down to allow easy plotting of broadened spectra with individual transition strengths.

spans.content: The Gaussian broadened spectrum (spec.dat) contains the molar extinction coefficient
(for absorption) or molar circular dichroism (for CD) spectra, both given in units of
\mathrm { L \cdot m o l ^ { - 1 } \cdot c m ^ { - 1 } }
. The individual transition strengths are given in the same units in
rots.dat. Note that by default LFAKTOR is set to 0.5, i.e., these are scaled down to
allow easy plotting of broadened spectra with individual transition strengths.

protected_source_text: The Gaussian broadened spectrum (spec.dat) contains the molar extinction coefficient (for absorption) or molar circular dichroism (for CD) spectra, both given in units of [[FORMULA_1]] . The individual transition strengths are given in the same units in rots.dat. Note that by default LFAKTOR is set to 0.5, i.e., these are scaled down to allow easy plotting of broadened spectra with individual transition strengths.

formula_map.formula_text: \mathrm { L \cdot m o l ^ { - 1 } \cdot c m ^ { - 1 } }

protected_translated_text: 高斯展宽光谱（spec.dat）包含摩尔消光系数（用于吸收）或摩尔圆二色谱（用于CD），两者均以[[FORMULA_1]]为单位给出。单个跃迁强度在rots.dat中以相同单位给出。请注意，默认情况下LFAKTOR设置为0.5，即这些值被缩小以便于绘制展宽光谱与单个跃迁强度的对比图。
translated_text: 高斯展宽光谱（spec.dat）包含摩尔消光系数（用于吸收）或摩尔圆二色谱（用于CD），两者均以\mathrm { L \cdot m o l ^ { - 1 } \cdot c m ^ { - 1 } }为单位给出。单个跃迁强度在rots.dat中以相同单位给出。请注意，默认情况下LFAKTOR设置为0.5，即这些值被缩小以便于绘制展宽光谱与单个跃迁强度的对比图。

spans.content: 5 Usage with GAUSSIAN

source_text: From version 1.3 on, the std2 program can be interfaced with the GAUSSIAN pro- gram[10] via the tool g2molden. This converts a GAUSSIAN output file into a Molden[7] input file which is processable by the std2 program. Make sure that the following key- words in your GAUSSIAN input file are set:
